verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lift my eyes and see, I need not be afraid All my help comes from the Lord Who the earth and sky has made

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He will keep you from all evils, behind you and before He will sustain you, through this journey From now and evermore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Lord will never sleep My steps He has ordained For the One who holds the night Is the Sovereign of my days
